title: Fly
description: This is a minecraft plugin which allows you to fly in survival mode just like in creative mode.
body:
This is a minecraft plugin which allows you to fly in survival mode just like in creative mode.

# Commands:
- /fly - Toggle your own flight mode
- /fly speed <0.1-10> - Set your flight speed
- /fly <player> - Toggle flight mode for other players
- /fly <player> speed <0.1-10> - Set another player's flight speed
- /flyreload - Reload the plugin configuration

# Permissions:
- fly.fly - Allows personal flight
- fly.speed - Allows changing flight speed
- other.fly - Allows managing other players' flight
- fly.reload - Allows reloading configuration


# Important when updating:
If you are upgrading from an older version, delete the existing _config.yml_ in the plugin folder before restarting the server. This ensures the new default configuration and message keys are applied and prevents conflicts.

Just send me a message on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/vVrpvBEfeQ) if you have any questions / suggestions or for new plugin requests.
